title: elaeoselinum asclepium var. hispanicum
intro: Elaeoselinum asclepium var. hispanicum, also known as Spanish Angelica, is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula, characterized by its fern-like leaves and tall stems. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Spanish Angelica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Spanish Angelica can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
